response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing or navigation pipelines, and his recent work centers on TypeScript/Node.js and AI agents rather than low-latency geospatial data systems — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Built and maintained an open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) used by NGOs.
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and contribute to distributed systems.
Strong track record of shipping production systems and contributing to dev-ops infrastructure.
concerns: No evidence of commercial C++ or Rust development in routing, mapping, or navigation contexts.
Recent roles focus on web/backend tooling (TypeScript/Node.js), not low-latency geospatial data pipelines.
Lacks explicit experience with fault tolerance, consistency, or real-time traffic integration in navigation systems.
